building_row.open_questions: Verify whether the exact unit is fully interior and away from Santa Monica Boulevard and the Trader Joe's loading pattern, ask whether Smart Access controls all entrances or only unit doors, and confirm whether parking, Connect+, and pet fees shown on Apartments.com exactly match the current lease packet.
building_row.notes: Avalon West Hollywood is one of the stronger management and service bets in this set. Official materials plus review aggregators support mature operations, digital package lockers, smart access entry, in-unit laundry, covered parking, and a large amenity stack. The catch is your top priority: this is a 294-unit mixed-use building on Santa Monica Boulevard with on-site retail and a rooftop terrace and pool, so location noise is meaningfully riskier than quieter side-street options. Pricing is fairly transparent but not fully simple, because mandatory Connect+ internet and smart-tech charges add $111 per month before parking or pet costs.

evidence_rows.claim: The official Avalon page surfaces a large current Google review corpus, which is a stronger management signal than the review-light new buildings in this list.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: The official search result for the property shows 4.3 Google Reviews with 231 reviews, indicating a much larger resident feedback base than most newer comps.

evidence_rows.claim: Avalon explicitly advertises Smart Access entry and 24/7 digital package lockers, which is a meaningful package and access-control strength.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Connect+ page says Smart Access lets residents unlock doors through an app or unique code, and package services use digital lockers with email alerts and a unique pin code available 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

evidence_rows.claim: Official and verified listing pages align on strong core amenities including in-unit laundry, pool, fitness center, bike storage, furnished options, and on-site retail.
evidence_rows.source_name: Apartments.com listing for Avalon West Hollywood
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Apartments.com says the building offers in-home washer and dryer, stainless kitchens, state of the art fitness center, rooftop terrace, swimming pool, WiFi in common areas, bike storage, furnished options, and on-site retail including Trader Joe's.

evidence_rows.claim: The public fee stack is clearer than average, but total all-in cost rises quickly once mandatory Connect+ and covered parking are included.
evidence_rows.source_name: Apartments.com fees and policies for Avalon West Hollywood
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Apartments.com lists Government License Fee $2.83 monthly, Connect+ Smart Tech $30 monthly, Connect+ Internet $81 monthly, cats and dogs each at $500 deposit plus $55 monthly per pet, and covered parking at $150 monthly.

evidence_rows.claim: A second large review aggregator also shows a solid but not flawless reputation, supporting a generally strong management score instead of a perfect one.
evidence_rows.source_name: Birdeye profile for Avalon West Hollywood
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Birdeye shows a 4.2 rating across 268 reviews, mostly from Google, which broadly backs the official review signal but also suggests some resident friction exists.

evidence_rows.claim: The building sits directly on Santa Monica Boulevard with on-site retail and rooftop recreation, which raises persistent ambient-noise risk for a quiet-first renter.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official and verified listing pages place the property on Santa Monica Boulevard and highlight on-site retail, rooftop terrace, pool, and a highly walkable WeHo setting. That is excellent for convenience but not a low-noise profile.

evidence_rows.claim: There is a dated but material public-safety incident associated with the building, which keeps security risk from scoring low despite strong current access-control features.
evidence_rows.source_name: CBS Los Angeles report on 2021 shooting at Avalon West Hollywood
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: CBS reported that a woman was shot and killed inside the Avalon West Hollywood apartment building in October 2021. This is not evidence of chronic present-day failure, but it is a non-trivial security datapoint.

evidence_rows.claim: Avalon West Hollywood appears established rather than lease-up volatile, but its mixed-use and furnished-housing profile still makes it feel more active than a quieter boutique building.
evidence_rows.source_name: Apartments.com listing for Avalon West Hollywood
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Apartments.com identifies the property as built in 2017 with 294 units over 7 stories and furnished units available. That supports mature operations, but also a larger, more active footprint than a quiet side-street community.

packet_markdown:
# Avalon West Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: avalon-west-hollywood-7316-santa-monica-blvd
- Address: 7316 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.avaloncommunities.com/california/west-hollywood-apartments/avalon-west-hollywood/
- Management company: AvalonBay Communities
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 6)
- Community stability: 3 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 4

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: medium
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official marketing surfaces 4.3 Google reviews from 231 reviews. Source: Avalon West Hollywood official listing (https://www.avaloncommunities.com/california/west-hollywood-apartments/avalon-west-hollywood/). Note: This is a stronger management signal than the review-light lease-up buildings.
- [official] Connect+ provides Smart Access entry and 24/7 digital package lockers. Source: Avalon West Hollywood Connect+ page (https://www.avaloncommunities.com/california/west-hollywood-apartments/avalon-west-hollywood/connect%2B/). Note: This is a real plus for package reliability and guest access control.
- [review] Apartments.com confirms in-unit washer and dryer, pool, rooftop terrace, fitness center, bike storage, on-site retail, and Trader Joe's. Source: Apartments.com listing (https://www.apartments.com/avalon-west-hollywood-west-hollywood-ca/wv7mqpk/). Note: Paper amenity fit is excellent.
- [review] Apartments.com discloses mandatory Connect+ fees and covered parking. Source: Apartments.com fees and policies (https://www.apartments.com/avalon-west-hollywood-west-hollywood-ca/wv7mqpk/). Note: Connect+ internet and smart tech add $111 monthly before parking or pets.
- [review] Birdeye shows 4.2 across 268 reviews. Source: Birdeye profile (https://reviews.birdeye.com/avalon-west-hollywood-156632295346353). Note: This backs a generally strong but not friction-free management profile.
- [official] The building sits directly on Santa Monica Boulevard and emphasizes a walkable mixed-use lifestyle. Source: Avalon official listing (https://www.avaloncommunities.com/california/west-hollywood-apartments/avalon-west-hollywood/). Note: Great fit for convenience, weaker fit for deep quiet.
- [news] A fatal shooting occurred in the building in 2021. Source: CBS Los Angeles (https://www.cbsnews.com/losangeles/news/woman-shot-killed-in-upscale-weho-apartment-building-no-suspect-identified/). Note: Dated incident, but it keeps security risk out of the low bucket.
- [review] Apartments.com identifies the property as built in 2017 with 294 units and furnished availability. Source: Apartments.com listing (https://www.apartments.com/avalon-west-hollywood-west-hollywood-ca/wv7mqpk/). Note: Operationally mature, but bigger and more active than a boutique building.

## Open questions
- Verify whether the target unit is interior and away from Santa Monica Boulevard.
- Ask whether Smart Access controls every entry point or mainly apartment doors.
- Confirm the current lease packet still matches the public Connect+, parking, and pet fees.

## Notes
Avalon West Hollywood looks better than average on management systems, package handling, and general professionalism. The reason it stays below tour-candidate status for this search is not because it looks badly run, but because the Santa Monica Boulevard frontage and mixed-use scale create a real quiet tradeoff for someone whose top priority is sleep and work calm.
